arts.ttl: Leeds United team news as Daniel Farke omits Pascal Struijk amid Ilia Gruev call
arts.sum: It means Ethan Ampadu will stay in defence alongside Joe Rodon, who has started every league game this season. Starting XI: Meslier; Bogle, Ampadu, Rodon, Firpo; Tanaka, Gruev; James, Aaronson, Solomon; Piroe

arts.ttl: Watford vs Leeds United TV channel, live stream details and kick-off time
arts.sum: Leeds United return to Championship action tonight as they travel to take on Watford at Vicarage Road. The Hornets sit in tenth place in the Championship table, but are winless in their last four games and have won just one of their last ten matches in all competitions.

arts.ttl: When Watford pulled off a shock victory against Leeds
arts.sum: A look back to when Watford caused a surprise against Leeds United at Vicarage Road by knocking them out of the League Cup in 1992.

arts.ttl: Leeds United’s long-term No10 solution might just give them an audition tonight
arts.sum: His quality on the ball as an attacking midfielder might serve as an audition for the summer, knowing Leeds are going to have to spend big upon (hopeful) promotion to improve in such a crucial position. Leeds facing significant Watford threat in Giorgi Chakvetadze

arts.ttl: Farke's Leeds United approach vindicated with Newcastle United and Bayern Munich comparison made
arts.sum: Farke's men are back on the road tonight as they take on Watford looking to bounce back from Saturday's FA Cup exit at the hands of Millwall. Gordon Strachan believes his former club Leeds United are destined to clinch promotion to the Premier League this season.

arts.ttl: Leeds United: Internal talks held over three attacking midfield targets
arts.sum: Leeds United have held internal talks over James McAtee, Gustavo Hamer and Eduard Spertsyan, according to TEAMtalk. Leeds… The post Leeds United: Internal talks held over three attacking midfield targets appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Report: What happened when Leeds tried to make Arne Slot their new manager before he joined Liverpool
arts.sum: Way before Liverpool appointed Arne Slot to replace Jurgen Klopp, Leeds United were seriously interested in bringing the Dutchman to Elland Road. Towards the beginning...

arts.ttl: Manor Solomon reveals Leeds United wish after new announcement
arts.sum: Leeds United winger Manor Solomon is in the form of his career in England at the moment and it earned him the club’s Player of the Month award in the process. Leeds are gearing up to take on Watford right now with plans to extend their lead at the top of the league, utilising an attacking contingent that are well clear as the best in the division with two goals scored per game after 31 outings.

arts.ttl: Confirmed long-term Leeds United blow is a real worry after recent transfer blunder
arts.sum: Leeds United have been lacking depth at centre-back throughout this season, but they will be heading to April with only two senior centre-backs as Max Wöber undergoes another surgery. Confirmed: Max Wöber ruled out until April with knee surgery

arts.ttl: What Watford boss Tom Cleverley said on Leeds United's 'suffocating' tactics and Daniel Farke
arts.sum: Head coach Tom Cleverley has warned his Watford players to expect Leeds United to try and "suffocate" them of possession at Vicarage Road tonight. Cleverley said: “The best teams usually bring out strong performances from us, we rise to that challenge.
